name: guild
description: A self-managing AI team for any repo. Drop in a Guild Master and a set of skills — works in Copilot CLI, VS Code, and Claude Code.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Guild Master orchestrator + orchestrate, train-agent, train-skill, guild-setup, guild-setup-markdown, and guild-setup-github skills.

plugins.name: markdown-memory
plugins.description: File-based team memory, inbox, and task tracking skills — decisions, insights, per-agent context, async messaging, and markdown-backed task list.

plugins.name: guild-setup-github
plugins.description: Bootstraps GitHub Issues-backed task tracking: creates required labels and installs the guild-tasks skill with the repo slug baked in.
